local Settings = {
    ESP   = { Enabled = true, Skeleton = true, Box = true, Line = true, Name = true, Health = true, Thickness = 0.6, LinePos = "TOP" },
    Aim   = { A999 = false, Receive = false, HitboxExpander = false, HitboxSize = 10 },
    Other = { AttractPlayers = false, Fly = false, FlyHeight = 0, FlySpeed = 0 },
    CurrentTab = "ESP"
}

local RunService       = game:GetService("RunService")
local Players          = game:GetService("Players")
local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")
local HttpService      = game:GetService("HttpService")
local TweenService     = game:GetService("TweenService")
local LocalPlayer      = Players.LocalPlayer
local Camera           = game.Workspace.CurrentCamera

-- =====================================================================
--  KEY SYSTEM
-- =====================================================================
local CONNECT_URL = "http://shop.dflzx.xyz/connect"
local KEY_FILE    = "ax_hwid.dat"

local keyValid   = false
local keyExpiry  = "—"
local savedKey   = ""

local function GetHWID()
    local ok, id = pcall(function()
        return tostring(game:GetService("RbxAnalyticsService"):GetClientId())
    end)
    return ok and id or tostring(LocalPlayer.UserId)
end

local function LoadKey()
    local ok, data = pcall(readfile, KEY_FILE)
    if ok and data and #data > 4 then return data end
    return ""
end

local function SaveKey(k)
    pcall(writefile, KEY_FILE, k)
end

local function VerifyKey(inputKey, callback)
    task.spawn(function()
        local ok, resp = pcall(function()
            return HttpService:RequestAsync({
                Url     = CONNECT_URL,
                Method  = "POST",
                Headers = { ["Content-Type"] = "application/json" },
                Body    = HttpService:JSONEncode({
                    key  = inputKey,
                    hwid = GetHWID()
                })
            })
        end)
        if ok and resp and resp.Success then
            local data = {}
            pcall(function() data = HttpService:JSONDecode(resp.Body) end)
            local valid  = (data.status == true) or (data.valid == true) or false
            local expiry = data.expiry or data.expire or data.expires or "—"
            callback(valid, expiry)
        else
            callback(false, "—")
        end
    end)
end

-- =====================================================================
--  AUTO-COLOR CYCLE
-- =====================================================================
local AutoColors = {
    Color3.fromRGB(59,  130, 246),
    Color3.fromRGB(37,  99,  235),
    Color3.fromRGB(99,  160, 255),
    Color3.fromRGB(30,  80,  220),
    Color3.fromRGB(80,  170, 255),
}
local autoColorIndex   = 1
local autoColorTimer   = 0
local currentAutoColor = AutoColors[1]

RunService.RenderStepped:Connect(function(dt)
    autoColorTimer = autoColorTimer + dt
    if autoColorTimer >= 1.4 then
        autoColorTimer   = 0
        autoColorIndex   = (autoColorIndex % #AutoColors) + 1
        currentAutoColor = AutoColors[autoColorIndex]
    end
end)

local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")

-- =====================================================================
--  A999 (StepTaken spam)
-- =====================================================================
RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function()
    if not Settings.Aim.A999 then return end
    pcall(function()
        ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("Remotes")
            :FindFirstChild("StepTaken")
            :FireServer(, false)
    end)
end)

-- =====================================================================
--  RECEIVE (ClaimReward spam)
-- =====================================================================
RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function()
    if not Settings.Aim.Receive then return end
    pcall(function()
        ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("Remotes")
            :FindFirstChild("ClaimReward")
            :FireServer()
    end)
end)

-- =====================================================================
--  HITBOX EXPANDER
-- =====================================================================
RunService.RenderStepped:Connect(function()
    for _, p in pairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
        if p ~= LocalPlayer and p.Character then
            local root = p.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
            if root then
                if Settings.Aim.HitboxExpander then
                    local sz = Settings.Aim.HitboxSize
                    root.Size         = Vector3.new(sz, sz, sz)
                    root.Transparency = 0.85
                else
                    root.Size         = Vector3.new(2, 2, 1)
                    root.Transparency = 1
                end
            end
        end
    end
end)

-- =====================================================================
--  ATTRACT PLAYERS
-- =====================================================================
local attractBodyVelocities = {}

local function CleanAttract(player)
    pcall(function()
        if attractBodyVelocities[player] then
            attractBodyVelocities[player]:Destroy()
            attractBodyVelocities[player] = nil
        end
        if player.Character then
            local root = player.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
            if root then
                local bv = root:FindFirstChild("_AttractBV")
                if bv then bv:Destroy() end
            end
        end
    end)
end

RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function(dt)
    if not Settings.Other.AttractPlayers then
        for p, _ in pairs(attractBodyVelocities) do CleanAttract(p) end
        return
    end
    local myChar = LocalPlayer.Character
    local myRoot = myChar and myChar:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
    if not myRoot then return end
    for _, p in pairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
        if p ~= LocalPlayer then
            local char = p.Character
            local root = char and char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
            local hum  = char and char:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("Humanoid")
            if root and hum and hum.Health > 0 then
                local diff = myRoot.Position - root.Position
                local dist = diff.Magnitude
                if dist > 2 then
                    local dir   = diff.Unit
                    local speed = math.clamp(dist * 8, 20, 120)
                    pcall(function()
                        local bv = root:FindFirstChild("_AttractBV")
                        if not bv then
                            bv          = Instance.new("BodyVelocity")
                            bv.Name     = "_AttractBV"
                            bv.MaxForce = Vector3.new(1e9, 1e9, 1e9)
                            bv.P        = 1e9
                            bv.Parent   = root
                            attractBodyVelocities[p] = bv
                        end
                        bv.Velocity = dir * speed
                    end)
                    pcall(function()
                        root.CFrame = root.CFrame:Lerp(
                            CFrame.new(myRoot.Position + dir * -2, myRoot.Position),
                            math.min(dt * 6, 1)
                        )
                    end)
                else
                    pcall(function()
                        local bv = root:FindFirstChild("_AttractBV")
                        if bv then bv.Velocity = Vector3.new(0, 0, 0) end
                    end)
                end
            end
        end
    end
end)

Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(p) CleanAttract(p) end)

-- =====================================================================
--  FLY
-- =====================================================================
local flyBV   = nil
local flyBG   = nil
local flyConn = nil

local function StopFly()
    if flyConn then flyConn:Disconnect(); flyConn = nil end
    pcall(function() if flyBV then flyBV:Destroy(); flyBV = nil end end)
    pcall(function() if flyBG then flyBG:Destroy(); flyBG = nil end end)
    local ch = LocalPlayer.Character
    local hm = ch and ch:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("Humanoid")
    if hm then hm.PlatformStand = false end
    Settings.Other.Fly = false
end

local function StartFly()
    StopFly()
    local ch   = LocalPlayer.Character
    local root = ch and ch:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
    local hm   = ch and ch:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("Humanoid")
    if not root or not hm then return end
    Settings.Other.Fly = true
    hm.PlatformStand   = true
    flyBV              = Instance.new("BodyVelocity")
    flyBV.MaxForce     = Vector3.new(1e9, 1e9, 1e9)
    flyBV.Velocity     = Vector3.new(0, 0, 0)
    flyBV.P            = 1e4
    flyBV.Parent       = root
    flyBG              = Instance.new("BodyGyro")
    flyBG.MaxTorque    = Vector3.new(1e9, 1e9, 1e9)
    flyBG.P            = 1e4
    flyBG.D            = 500
    flyBG.CFrame       = root.CFrame
    flyBG.Parent       = root
    flyConn = RunService.RenderStepped:Connect(function()
        local c  = LocalPlayer.Character
        local r  = c and c:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
        local h  = c and c:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("Humanoid")
        if not r or not h then StopFly(); return end
        local camCF = Camera.CFrame
        local fwd   = Vector3.new(camCF.LookVector.X, 0, camCF.LookVector.Z)
        if fwd.Magnitude > 0 then fwd = fwd.Unit end
        local md   = h.MoveDirection
        local hVel = Vector3.new(0, 0, 0)
        if md.Magnitude > 0.05 then
            hVel = Vector3.new(md.X, 0, md.Z) * Settings.Other.FlySpeed
        end
        local rcp = RaycastParams.new()
        rcp.FilterDescendantsInstances = { c }
        rcp.FilterType = Enum.RaycastFilterType.Exclude
        local ray  = workspace:Raycast(r.Position, Vector3.new(0, -(Settings.Other.FlyHeight + 30), 0), rcp)
        local yVel = 0
        if ray then
            local targetY = ray.Position.Y + Settings.Other.FlyHeight
            yVel = math.clamp((targetY - r.Position.Y) * 8, -60, 60)
        else
            yVel = math.clamp(Settings.Other.FlyHeight * 0.5, 0, 30)
        end
        flyBV.Velocity = Vector3.new(hVel.X, yVel, hVel.Z)
        if md.Magnitude > 0.05 then
            flyBG.CFrame = CFrame.new(r.Position, r.Position + fwd)
        end
    end)
end

LocalPlayer.CharacterAdded:Connect(function()
    if Settings.Other.Fly then task.wait(1); StartFly() end
end)

-- =====================================================================
--  ESP
-- =====================================================================
local espConnections = {}
local espDrawings    = {}

local function DestroyESP(player)
    if espConnections[player] then
        espConnections[player]:Disconnect()
        espConnections[player] = nil
    end
    if espDrawings[player] then
        for _, d in pairs(espDrawings[player].esp)   do pcall(function() d:Remove() end) end
        for _, d in pairs(espDrawings[player].limbs) do pcall(function() d:Remove() end) end
        espDrawings[player] = nil
    end
end

local function CreateFullESP(player)
    DestroyESP(player)
    local esp = {
        box       = Drawing.new("Square"),
        line      = Drawing.new("Line"),
        healthBar = Drawing.new("Line"),
        name      = Drawing.new("Text"),
    }
    local limbs = {}
    for i = 1, 14 do limbs[i] = Drawing.new("Line") end
    espDrawings[player] = { esp = esp, limbs = limbs }
    esp.box.Filled          = false
    esp.name.Size           = 12
    esp.name.Center         = true
    esp.name.Outline        = true
    esp.healthBar.Thickness = 1.5

    local function drawBone(line, p1, p2)
        if p1 and p2 and p1 ~= p2 then
            local aPos = Camera:WorldToViewportPoint(p1.Position)
            local bPos = Camera:WorldToViewportPoint(p2.Position)
            if aPos.Z > 0 and bPos.Z > 0 then
                line.From      = Vector2.new(aPos.X, aPos.Y)
                line.To        = Vector2.new(bPos.X, bPos.Y)
                line.Color     = currentAutoColor
                line.Thickness = 0.5
                line.Visible   = true
                return
            end
        end
        line.Visible = false
    end

    local function HideAll()
        for _, v in pairs(esp)   do pcall(function() v.Visible = false end) end
        for i = 1, #limbs       do pcall(function() limbs[i].Visible = false end) end
    end

    local function Update()
        if not espDrawings[player] then return end
        local ok = pcall(function()
            local char = player.Character
            local hum  = char and char:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("Humanoid")
            if not char or not char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") or not hum or hum.Health <= 0 then
                HideAll(); return
            end
            local root          = char.HumanoidRootPart
            local pos, onScreen = Camera:WorldToViewportPoint(root.Position)
            local distance      = (Camera.CFrame.Position - root.Position).Magnitude
            if onScreen and Settings.ESP.Enabled then
                local sizeX = math.clamp(1000 / distance, 10, 150)
                local sizeY = sizeX * 1.6
                if Settings.ESP.Box then
                    esp.box.Visible   = true
                    esp.box.Size      = Vector2.new(sizeX, sizeY)
                    esp.box.Position  = Vector2.new(pos.X - sizeX / 2, pos.Y - sizeY / 2)
                    esp.box.Color     = currentAutoColor
                    esp.box.Thickness = Settings.ESP.Thickness
                else esp.box.Visible = false end
                if Settings.ESP.Line then
                    esp.line.Visible = true
                    if Settings.ESP.LinePos == "CENTER" then
                        esp.line.From = Vector2.new(Camera.ViewportSize.X / 2, Camera.ViewportSize.Y / 2)
                    elseif Settings.ESP.LinePos == "BOTTOM" then
                        esp.line.From = Vector2.new(Camera.ViewportSize.X / 2, Camera.ViewportSize.Y)
                    else
                        esp.line.From = Vector2.new(Camera.ViewportSize.X / 2, 0)
                    end
                    esp.line.To           = Vector2.new(pos.X, pos.Y - sizeY / 2)
                    esp.line.Color        = currentAutoColor
                    esp.line.Thickness    = Settings.ESP.Thickness
                    esp.line.Transparency = math.clamp(1 - (distance / 1200), 0.35, 0.95)
                else esp.line.Visible = false end
                if Settings.ESP.Health then
                    local hp = math.clamp(hum.Health / math.max(hum.MaxHealth, 1), 0, 1)
                    esp.healthBar.Visible = true
                    esp.healthBar.From    = Vector2.new(pos.X - sizeX / 2 - 5, pos.Y + sizeY / 2)
                    esp.healthBar.To      = Vector2.new(pos.X - sizeX / 2 - 5, pos.Y + sizeY / 2 - sizeY * hp)
                    esp.healthBar.Color   = Color3.fromRGB(math.floor(255 - 255 * hp), math.floor(255 * hp), 0)
                else esp.healthBar.Visible = false end
                if Settings.ESP.Name then
                    esp.name.Visible  = true
                    esp.name.Text     = player.Name .. " [" .. math.floor(distance) .. "m]"
                    esp.name.Position = Vector2.new(pos.X, pos.Y - sizeY / 2 - 16)
                    esp.name.Color    = currentAutoColor
                else esp.name.Visible = false end
                if Settings.ESP.Skeleton then
                    local isR15 = char:FindFirstChild("UpperTorso") ~= nil
                    local bones = {}
                    if isR15 then
                        local head   = char:FindFirstChild("Head")
                        local uTorso = char:FindFirstChild("UpperTorso")
                        local lTorso = char:FindFirstChild("LowerTorso")
                        local lUA    = char:FindFirstChild("LeftUpperArm")
                        local lLA    = char:FindFirstChild("LeftLowerArm")
                        local lHand  = char:FindFirstChild("LeftHand")
                        local rUA    = char:FindFirstChild("RightUpperArm")
                        local rLA    = char:FindFirstChild("RightLowerArm")
                        local rHand  = char:FindFirstChild("RightHand")
                        local lUL    = char:FindFirstChild("LeftUpperLeg")
                        local lLL    = char:FindFirstChild("LeftLowerLeg")
                        local lFoot  = char:FindFirstChild("LeftFoot")
                        local rUL    = char:FindFirstChild("RightUpperLeg")
                        local rLL    = char:FindFirstChild("RightLowerLeg")
                        local rFoot  = char:FindFirstChild("RightFoot")
                        bones = {
                            {head, uTorso}, {uTorso, lTorso},
                            {uTorso, lUA}, {lUA, lLA}, {lLA, lHand},
                            {uTorso, rUA}, {rUA, rLA}, {rLA, rHand},
                            {lTorso, lUL}, {lUL, lLL}, {lLL, lFoot},
                            {lTorso, rUL}, {rUL, rLL}, {rLL, rFoot},
                        }
                    else
                        local head  = char:FindFirstChild("Head")
                        local torso = char:FindFirstChild("Torso")
                        local lArm  = char:FindFirstChild("Left Arm")
                        local rArm  = char:FindFirstChild("Right Arm")
                        local lLeg  = char:FindFirstChild("Left Leg")
                        local rLeg  = char:FindFirstChild("Right Leg")
                        bones = {
                            {head, torso},
                            {torso, lArm}, {torso, rArm},
                            {torso, lLeg}, {torso, rLeg},
                        }
                    end
                    for i = 1, #limbs do
                        drawBone(limbs[i], bones[i] and bones[i][1], bones[i] and bones[i][2])
                    end
                else
                    for i = 1, #limbs do limbs[i].Visible = false end
                end
            else HideAll() end
        end)
        if not ok then HideAll() end
    end

    espConnections[player] = RunService.RenderStepped:Connect(Update)
    player.CharacterAdded:Connect(function()
        task.wait(1)
        if player and player.Parent then CreateFullESP(player) end
    end)
end

for _, p in pairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
    if p ~= LocalPlayer then CreateFullESP(p) end
end
Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(p)
    if p ~= LocalPlayer then task.wait(1); CreateFullESP(p) end
end)
Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(p) DestroyESP(p) end)

local Container = Instance.new("Frame", MainFrame)
Container.Size                   = UDim2.new(1, -82, 1, -58)
Container.Position               = UDim2.new(0, 78, 0, 52)
Container.BackgroundTransparency = 1
Container.ClipsDescendants       = true
Container.ZIndex                 = 6

local Pages = {}
local function CreatePage(tabName)
    local page = Instance.new("ScrollingFrame", Container)
    page.Size                   = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
    page.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    page.AutomaticCanvasSize    = Enum.AutomaticSize.Y
    page.CanvasSize             = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0)
    page.ScrollBarThickness     = 2
    page.ScrollBarImageColor3   = W_STROKE2
    page.ScrollingDirection     = Enum.ScrollingDirection.Y
    page.Visible                = false
    page.ZIndex                 = 6
    local layout = Instance.new("UIListLayout", page)
    layout.Padding   = UDim.new(0, 6)
    layout.SortOrder = Enum.SortOrder.LayoutOrder
    local pad = Instance.new("UIPadding", page)
    pad.PaddingTop    = UDim.new(0, 6)
    pad.PaddingRight  = UDim.new(0, 8)
    pad.PaddingBottom = UDim.new(0, 8)
    Pages[tabName] = page
    return page
end

local EspPage   = CreatePage("ESP")
local AimPage   = CreatePage("AIM")
local OtherPage = CreatePage("OTHER")
local AdminPage = CreatePage("TEST")
local InfoPage  = CreatePage("INFO")

-- =====================================================================
--  TAB SWITCHING
-- =====================================================================
local TabButtons = {}
local function SwitchTab(tabName)
    Settings.CurrentTab = tabName
    for name, page in pairs(Pages) do
        page.Visible = (name == tabName)
    end
    for name, btn in pairs(TabButtons) do
        if name == tabName then
            TweenService:Create(btn, TweenInfo.new(0.2, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad, Enum.EasingDirection.Out), {
                BackgroundColor3     = W_ACCENT,
                TextColor3           = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255),
                BackgroundTransparency = 0,
            }):Play()
            local s = btn:FindFirstChildOfClass("UIStroke")
            if s then s.Thickness = 0 end
        else
            TweenService:Create(btn, TweenInfo.new(0.2, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad, Enum.EasingDirection.Out), {
                BackgroundColor3     = W_SIDEBAR,
                TextColor3           = W_MUTED,
                BackgroundTransparency = 0,
            }):Play()
            local s = btn:FindFirstChildOfClass("UIStroke")
            if s then s.Thickness = 0 end
        end
    end
end

local function AddTabButton(name, icon, label)
    local btn = Instance.new("TextButton", Sidebar)
    btn.Size                   = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 32)
    btn.Text                   = (icon ~= "" and (icon .. "  ") or "") .. label
    btn.Font                   = Enum.Font.GothamBold
    btn.TextSize               = 9
    btn.TextXAlignment         = Enum.TextXAlignment.Center
    btn.TextColor3             = W_MUTED
    btn.BackgroundColor3       = W_SIDEBAR
    btn.BackgroundTransparency = 0
    btn.ZIndex                 = 7
    Instance.new("UICorner", btn).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 12)

    btn.MouseEnter:Connect(function()
        if Settings.CurrentTab ~= name then
            TweenService:Create(btn, TweenInfo.new(0.12), {
                BackgroundColor3 = W_STROKE,
            }):Play()
        end
    end)
    btn.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
        if Settings.CurrentTab ~= name then
            TweenService:Create(btn, TweenInfo.new(0.12), {
                BackgroundColor3 = W_SIDEBAR,
            }):Play()
        end
    end)
    btn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() SwitchTab(name) end)
    TabButtons[name] = btn
end

AddTabButton("ESP",   "", "ESP")
AddTabButton("AIM",   "", "AIM")
AddTabButton("OTHER", "", "OTHER")
AddTabButton("TEST",  "", "TEST")
AddTabButton("INFO",  "", "INFO")

-- =====================================================================
--  WIDGET HELPERS
-- =====================================================================
local function MakeCard(page, order)
    local f = Instance.new("Frame", page)
    f.Size                   = UDim2.new(1, -4, 0, 38)
    f.BackgroundColor3       = W_CARD
    f.BackgroundTransparency = 0.97
    f.ZIndex                 = 7
    f.LayoutOrder            = order or 0
    Instance.new("UICorner", f).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 12)
    local s = Instance.new("UIStroke", f)
    s.Color     = W_STROKE
    s.Thickness = 1
    return f
end

local function AddToggle(page, name, target, key, order)
    local f = MakeCard(page, order)
    -- Left accent dot
    local dot = Instance.new("Frame", f)
    dot.Size             = UDim2.new(0, 4, 0, 22)
    dot.Position         = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0.5, -11)
    dot.BackgroundColor3 = W_INACTIVE
    dot.ZIndex           = 8
    Instance.new("UICorner", dot).CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)

    local TL = Instance.new("TextLabel", f)
    TL.Text                   = name
    TL.Size                   = UDim2.new(0.6, 0, 1, 0)
    TL.Position               = UDim2.new(0, 18, 0, 0)
    TL.Font                   = Enum.Font.GothamBold
    TL.TextSize               = 11
    TL.TextColor3             = W_TEXT
    TL.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    TL.TextXAlignment         = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
    TL.ZIndex                 = 8

    -- Toggle track
    local Track = Instance.new("Frame", f)
    Track.Size             = UDim2.new(0, 34, 0, 18)
    Track.Position         = UDim2.new(1, -42, 0.5, -9)
    Track.BackgroundColor3 = target[key] and W_ON or W_TRACK
    Track.ZIndex           = 8
    Instance.new("UICorner", Track).CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)

    local Knob = Instance.new("Frame", Track)
    Knob.Size             = UDim2.new(0, 12, 0, 12)
    Knob.Position         = target[key] and UDim2.new(1, -17, 0.5, -6) or UDim2.new(0, 3, 0.5, -6)
    Knob.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
    Knob.ZIndex           = 9
    Instance.new("UICorner", Knob).CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)
    local KS = Instance.new("UIStroke", Knob)
    KS.Color     = Color3.fromRGB(220, 228, 245)
    KS.Thickness = 0.5

    local function Refresh()
        local on = target[key]
        TweenService:Create(Track, TweenInfo.new(0.2, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad), {
            BackgroundColor3 = on and W_ON or W_TRACK,
        }):Play()
        TweenService:Create(Knob, TweenInfo.new(0.2, Enum.EasingStyle.Back, Enum.EasingDirection.Out), {
            Position = on and UDim2.new(1, -17, 0.5, -6) or UDim2.new(0, 3, 0.5, -6),
        }):Play()
        TweenService:Create(dot, TweenInfo.new(0.2), {
            BackgroundColor3 = on and W_ACCENT or W_INACTIVE,
        }):Play()
    end

    Track.InputBegan:Connect(function(i)
        if i.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 or i.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
            target[key] = not target[key]
            Refresh()
        end
    end)
    Refresh()
end

local _activeDragFn = nil
UserInputService.InputChanged:Connect(function(i)
    if _activeDragFn and (i.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseMovement or i.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch) then
        _activeDragFn(i.Position)
    end
end)
UserInputService.InputEnded:Connect(function(i)
    if i.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 or i.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
        _activeDragFn = nil
    end
end)

local function AddSlider(page, name, minVal, maxVal, target, key, order)
    local f = MakeCard(page, order)
    f.Size = UDim2.new(1, -4, 0, 54)

    local dot = Instance.new("Frame", f)
    dot.Size             = UDim2.new(0, 4, 0, 22)
    dot.Position         = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 8)
    dot.BackgroundColor3 = W_ACCENT
    dot.ZIndex           = 8
    Instance.new("UICorner", dot).CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)

    local LT = Instance.new("TextLabel", f)
    LT.Text                   = name
    LT.Size                   = UDim2.new(0.6, 0, 0, 24)
    LT.Position               = UDim2.new(0, 18, 0, 4)
    LT.Font                   = Enum.Font.GothamBold
    LT.TextSize               = 11
    LT.TextColor3             = W_TEXT
    LT.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    LT.TextXAlignment         = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
    LT.ZIndex                 = 8

    local ValTag = Instance.new("TextLabel", f)
    ValTag.Text                   = tostring(target[key])
    ValTag.Size                   = UDim2.new(0, 46, 0, 24)
    ValTag.Position               = UDim2.new(1, -52, 0, 4)
    ValTag.Font                   = Enum.Font.GothamBold
    ValTag.TextSize               = 11
    ValTag.TextColor3             = W_ACCENT
    ValTag.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    ValTag.TextXAlignment         = Enum.TextXAlignment.Right
    ValTag.ZIndex                 = 8

    local TrackBg = Instance.new("Frame", f)
    TrackBg.Size             = UDim2.new(1, -24, 0, 6)
    TrackBg.Position         = UDim2.new(0, 12, 0, 38)
    TrackBg.BackgroundColor3 = W_TRACK
    TrackBg.ZIndex           = 8
    Instance.new("UICorner", TrackBg).CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)

    local pctInit = (target[key] - minVal) / math.max(maxVal - minVal, 1)
    local Fill = Instance.new("Frame", TrackBg)
    Fill.Size             = UDim2.new(pctInit, 0, 1, 0)
    Fill.BackgroundColor3 = W_ACCENT
    Fill.ZIndex           = 9
    Instance.new("UICorner", Fill).CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)

    local Knob = Instance.new("Frame", TrackBg)
    Knob.Size             = UDim2.new(0, 16, 0, 16)
    Knob.AnchorPoint      = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
    Knob.Position         = UDim2.new(pctInit, 0, 0.5, 0)
    Knob.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
    Knob.ZIndex           = 10
    Instance.new("UICorner", Knob).CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)
    local KnobStroke = Instance.new("UIStroke", Knob)
    KnobStroke.Color     = W_ACCENT
    KnobStroke.Thickness = 2

    local HitBox = Instance.new("TextButton", f)
    HitBox.Size                   = UDim2.new(1, -24, 0, 28)
    HitBox.Position               = UDim2.new(0, 12, 0, 26)
    HitBox.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    HitBox.Text                   = ""
    HitBox.ZIndex                 = 11

    local function Set(ip)
        local pct = math.clamp((ip.X - TrackBg.AbsolutePosition.X) / TrackBg.AbsoluteSize.X, 0, 1)
        local val = maxVal <= 10
            and (math.floor(pct * (maxVal - minVal) * 10 + minVal * 10) / 10)
            or math.floor(minVal + pct * (maxVal - minVal))
        target[key]   = val
        ValTag.Text   = tostring(val)
        Fill.Size     = UDim2.new(pct, 0, 1, 0)
        Knob.Position = UDim2.new(pct, 0, 0.5, 0)
    end
    HitBox.InputBegan:Connect(function(i)
        if i.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 or i.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
            _activeDragFn = Set; Set(i.Position)
        end
    end)
    TrackBg.InputBegan:Connect(function(i)
        if i.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 or i.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
            _activeDragFn = Set; Set(i.Position)
        end
    end)
end

local function AddSelector(page, name, options, target, key, order)
    local f = MakeCard(page, order)

    local dot = Instance.new("Frame", f)
    dot.Size             = UDim2.new(0, 4, 0, 22)
    dot.Position         = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0.5, -11)
    dot.BackgroundColor3 = W_ACCENT
    dot.ZIndex           = 8
    Instance.new("UICorner", dot).CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)

    local TL = Instance.new("TextLabel", f)
    TL.Text                   = name
    TL.Size                   = UDim2.new(0.46, 0, 1, 0)
    TL.Position               = UDim2.new(0, 18, 0, 0)
    TL.Font                   = Enum.Font.GothamBold
    TL.TextSize               = 11
    TL.TextColor3             = W_TEXT
    TL.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    TL.TextXAlignment         = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
    TL.ZIndex                 = 8

    local Btn = Instance.new("TextButton", f)
    Btn.Font             = Enum.Font.GothamBold
    Btn.TextSize         = 10
    Btn.TextColor3       = W_ACCENT
    Btn.BackgroundColor3 = W_SIDEBAR
    Btn.Size             = UDim2.new(0, 96, 0, 28)
    Btn.Position         = UDim2.new(1, -104, 0.5, -14)
    Btn.ZIndex           = 8
    Instance.new("UICorner", Btn).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 8)
    local BS = Instance.new("UIStroke", Btn)
    BS.Color     = W_STROKE
    BS.Thickness = 1

    Btn.MouseEnter:Connect(function()
        TweenService:Create(Btn, TweenInfo.new(0.12), { BackgroundColor3 = W_STROKE }):Play()
    end)
    Btn.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
        TweenService:Create(Btn, TweenInfo.new(0.12), { BackgroundColor3 = W_SURFACE }):Play()
    end)

    local idx = 1
    for i, v in ipairs(options) do if target[key] == v then idx = i; break end end
    local function Upd()
        target[key] = options[idx]
        Btn.Text    = "‹ " .. options[idx] .. " ›"
    end
    Btn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() idx = (idx % #options) + 1; Upd() end)
    Upd()
end

local function MakeFlySlider(order, name, key)
    local f = MakeCard(OtherPage, order)
    f.Size = UDim2.new(1, -4, 0, 50)
    local ac = Instance.new("Frame", f)
    ac.Size             = UDim2.new(0, 3, 0, 20)
    ac.Position         = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 8)
    ac.BackgroundColor3 = W_ACCENT
    ac.ZIndex           = 8
    Instance.new("UICorner", ac).CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)
    local lt = Instance.new("TextLabel", f)
    lt.Text                   = name .. ":  0"
    lt.Size                   = UDim2.new(1, -14, 0, 22)
    lt.Position               = UDim2.new(0, 14, 0, 4)
    lt.Font                   = Enum.Font.GothamBold
    lt.TextSize               = 10
    lt.TextColor3             = W_TEXT
    lt.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    lt.TextXAlignment         = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
    lt.ZIndex                 = 8
    local trackBg = Instance.new("Frame", f)
    trackBg.Size             = UDim2.new(1, -20, 0, 8)
    trackBg.Position         = UDim2.new(0, 10, 0, 34)
    trackBg.BackgroundColor3 = W_TRACK
    trackBg.ZIndex           = 8
    Instance.new("UICorner", trackBg).CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)
    local fill = Instance.new("Frame", trackBg)
    fill.Size             = UDim2.new(0, 0, 1, 0)
    fill.BackgroundColor3 = W_ACCENT
    fill.ZIndex           = 9
    Instance.new("UICorner", fill).CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)
    local knob = Instance.new("Frame", trackBg)
    knob.Size             = UDim2.new(0, 18, 0, 18)
    knob.AnchorPoint      = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
    knob.Position         = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0.5, 0)
    knob.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
    knob.ZIndex           = 10
    Instance.new("UICorner", knob).CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)
    local ks = Instance.new("UIStroke", knob)
    ks.Color     = W_ACCENT
    ks.Thickness = 1.5
    local hitbox = Instance.new("TextButton", f)
    hitbox.Size                   = UDim2.new(1, -20, 0, 36)
    hitbox.Position               = UDim2.new(0, 10, 0, 16)
    hitbox.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    hitbox.Text                   = ""
    hitbox.ZIndex                 = 11
    local function Set(ip)
        local pct = math.clamp((ip.X - trackBg.AbsolutePosition.X) / trackBg.AbsoluteSize.X, 0, 1)
        local val = math.floor(pct * 200)
        Settings.Other[key] = val
        lt.Text        = name .. ":  " .. val
        fill.Size      = UDim2.new(pct, 0, 1, 0)
        knob.Position  = UDim2.new(pct, 0, 0.5, 0)
    end
    hitbox.InputBegan:Connect(function(i)
        if i.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 or i.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
            _activeDragFn = Set; Set(i.Position)
        end
    end)
    trackBg.InputBegan:Connect(function(i)
        if i.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 or i.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
            _activeDragFn = Set; Set(i.Position)
        end
    end)
end

    }):Play()

end
flyTrack.InputBegan:Connect(function(i)
    if i.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 or i.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
        if Settings.Other.Fly then StopFly() else StartFly() end
        RefreshFlyToggle()
    end
end)

local tpAcc = Instance.new("Frame", tpHeader)

tpAcc.BackgroundColor3 = W_ACCENT
tpAcc.ZIndex           = 8
Instance.new("UICorner", tpAcc).CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)
local tpTitle = Instance.new("TextLabel", tpHeader)
tpTitle.Text                   = "TELEPORT"
tpTitle.Size                   = UDim2.new(1, -14, 1, 0)
tpTitle.Position               = UDim2.new(0, 14, 0, 0)
tpTitle.Font                   = Enum.Font.GothamBold
tpTitle.TextSize               = 10
tpTitle.TextColor3             = W_ACCENT
tpTitle.BackgroundTransparency = 1
tpTitle.TextXAlignment         = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
tpTitle.ZIndex                 = 8

local tpCardOrder = 11
local tpCards     = {}
local tpCount     = 0

local function RefreshTpHeader() tpHeader.Visible = tpCount > 0 end

local function RemoveTpCard(player)
    if tpCards[player] then
        tpCards[player]:Destroy()
        tpCards[player] = nil
        tpCount = math.max(tpCount - 1, 0)
        RefreshTpHeader()
    end
end

local function AddTpCard(player)
    RemoveTpCard(player)
    local f = Instance.new("Frame", OtherPage)
    f.Size                   = UDim2.new(1, -4, 0, 40)
    f.BackgroundColor3       = W_CARD
    f.BackgroundTransparency = 0.97
    f.ZIndex                 = 7
    f.LayoutOrder            = tpCardOrder
    tpCardOrder              = tpCardOrder + 1
    Instance.new("UICorner", f).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 10)
    local s = Instance.new("UIStroke", f)
    s.Color     = W_STROKE
    s.Thickness = 1
    local nameLabel = Instance.new("TextLabel", f)
    nameLabel.Text                   = "> " .. player.Name
    nameLabel.Size                   = UDim2.new(0.6, 0, 1, 0)
    nameLabel.Position               = UDim2.new(0, 12, 0, 0)
    nameLabel.Font                   = Enum.Font.GothamBold
    nameLabel.TextSize               = 10
    nameLabel.TextColor3             = W_ACCENT
    nameLabel.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    nameLabel.TextXAlignment         = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
    nameLabel.ZIndex                 = 8
    local tpBtn = Instance.new("TextButton", f)
    tpBtn.Text             = "TP"
    tpBtn.Font             = Enum.Font.GothamBold
    tpBtn.TextSize         = 9
    tpBtn.TextColor3       = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
    tpBtn.BackgroundColor3 = W_ACCENT
    tpBtn.Size             = UDim2.new(0, 44, 0, 26)
    tpBtn.Position         = UDim2.new(1, -52, 0.5, -13)
    tpBtn.ZIndex           = 8
    Instance.new("UICorner", tpBtn).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 7)
    tpBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
        local myChar    = LocalPlayer.Character
        local myRoot    = myChar and myChar:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
        local theirChar = player.Character
        local theirRoot = theirChar and theirChar:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
        if myRoot and theirRoot then
            myRoot.CFrame = theirRoot.CFrame + Vector3.new(0, 3, 0)
        end
    end)
    tpCards[player] = f
    tpCount         = tpCount + 1
    RefreshTpHeader()
end

for _, p in pairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
    if p ~= LocalPlayer then AddTpCard(p) end
end
Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(p)
    if p ~= LocalPlayer then task.wait(0.5); AddTpCard(p) end
end)
Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(p)
    task.wait(0.1); RemoveTpCard(p)
end)

local swingSaberActive = false
local swingSaberConn   = nil

local function StartSwingSaber()
    swingSaberActive = true
    swingSaberConn = RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function()
        if not swingSaberActive then return end
        pcall(function()
            game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").Events.SwingSaber:FireServer()
        end)
    end)
end

local function StopSwingSaber()
    swingSaberActive = false
    if swingSaberConn then
        swingSaberConn:Disconnect()
        swingSaberConn = nil
    end
end

saberLabel.Size                   = UDim2.new(0.65, 0, 1, 0)

local function RefreshSaber()
    local on = swingSaberActive
    TweenService:Create(saberTrack, TweenInfo.new(0.15), { BackgroundColor3 = on and W_ON or W_TRACK }):Play()
    TweenService:Create(saberKnob, TweenInfo.new(0.15), {
        Position = on and UDim2.new(1, -17, 0.5, -7) or UDim2.new(0, 3, 0.5, -7),
    }):Play()
    saberAccent.BackgroundColor3 = on and W_ACCENT or W_INACTIVE
end

saberTrack.InputBegan:Connect(function(i)
    if i.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 or i.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
        if swingSaberActive then StopSwingSaber() else StartSwingSaber() end
        RefreshSaber()
    end
end)
RefreshSaber()

local function AddRapidToggle(page, label, order, fn)
    local active = false
    local conn   = nil
    local f = MakeCard(page, order)
    local accent = Instance.new("Frame", f)
    accent.Size             = UDim2.new(0, 3, 0, 20)
    accent.Position         = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0.5, -10)
    accent.BackgroundColor3 = W_INACTIVE
    accent.ZIndex           = 8
    Instance.new("UICorner", accent).CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)
    local lbl = Instance.new("TextLabel", f)
    lbl.Text                   = label
    lbl.Size                   = UDim2.new(0.65, 0, 1, 0)
    lbl.Position               = UDim2.new(0, 14, 0, 0)
    lbl.Font                   = Enum.Font.GothamBold
    lbl.TextSize               = 10
    lbl.TextColor3             = W_TEXT
    lbl.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    lbl.TextXAlignment         = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
    lbl.ZIndex                 = 8
    local track = Instance.new("Frame", f)
    track.Size             = UDim2.new(0, 38, 0, 20)
    track.Position         = UDim2.new(1, -46, 0.5, -10)
    track.BackgroundColor3 = W_TRACK
    track.ZIndex           = 8
    Instance.new("UICorner", track).CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)
    local knob = Instance.new("Frame", track)
    knob.Size             = UDim2.new(0, 14, 0, 14)
    knob.Position         = UDim2.new(0, 3, 0.5, -7)
    knob.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
    knob.ZIndex           = 9
    Instance.new("UICorner", knob).CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)
    Instance.new("UIStroke", knob).Color = W_STROKE
    local function Refresh()
        TweenService:Create(track, TweenInfo.new(0.15), { BackgroundColor3 = active and W_ON or W_TRACK }):Play()
        TweenService:Create(knob, TweenInfo.new(0.15), {
            Position = active and UDim2.new(1, -17, 0.5, -7) or UDim2.new(0, 3, 0.5, -7),
        }):Play()
        accent.BackgroundColor3 = active and W_ACCENT or W_INACTIVE
    end
    track.InputBegan:Connect(function(i)
        if i.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 or i.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
            active = not active
            if active then
                conn = RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function()
                    if not active then return end
                    pcall(fn)
                end)
            else
                if conn then conn:Disconnect(); conn = nil end
            end
            Refresh()
        end
    end)
    Refresh()
end

local function MakeInfoRow(page, order, labelText, valueText)
    local f = MakeCard(page, order)
    local accent = Instance.new("Frame", f)
    accent.Size             = UDim2.new(0, 3, 0, 20)
    accent.Position         = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0.5, -10)
    accent.BackgroundColor3 = W_ACCENT
    accent.ZIndex           = 8
    Instance.new("UICorner", accent).CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)
    local lbl = Instance.new("TextLabel", f)
    lbl.Text                   = labelText
    lbl.Size                   = UDim2.new(0.48, 0, 1, 0)
    lbl.Position               = UDim2.new(0, 14, 0, 0)
    lbl.Font                   = Enum.Font.GothamBold
    lbl.TextSize               = 10
    lbl.TextColor3             = W_MUTED
    lbl.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    lbl.TextXAlignment         = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
    lbl.ZIndex                 = 8
    local val = Instance.new("TextLabel", f)
    val.Text                   = valueText
    val.Size                   = UDim2.new(0.50, 0, 1, 0)
    val.Position               = UDim2.new(0.48, 0, 0, 0)
    val.Font                   = Enum.Font.GothamBold
    val.TextSize               = 10
    val.TextColor3             = W_TEXT
    val.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    val.TextXAlignment         = Enum.TextXAlignment.Right
    val.ZIndex                 = 8
    return val
end

-- =====================================================================
--  OPEN / CLOSE ANIMATION
-- =====================================================================
local menuOpen = false

local function OpenMenu()
    menuOpen = true
    MainFrame.Size                   = UDim2.new(0, 298, 0, 0)
    MainFrame.BackgroundTransparency = 0.3
    MainFrame.Visible                = true
    Shadow.BackgroundTransparency    = 1
    Shadow.Visible                   = true
    TweenService:Create(MainFrame, TweenInfo.new(0.35, Enum.EasingStyle.Back, Enum.EasingDirection.Out), {
        Size                   = UDim2.new(0, 298, 0, 248),
        BackgroundTransparency = 0,
    }):Play()
    TweenService:Create(Shadow, TweenInfo.new(0.35, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad, Enum.EasingDirection.Out), {
        BackgroundTransparency = 0.80,
    }):Play()
end

local function CloseMenu()
    menuOpen = false
    TweenService:Create(MainFrame, TweenInfo.new(0.22, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad, Enum.EasingDirection.In), {
        Size                   = UDim2.new(0, 298, 0, 0),
        BackgroundTransparency = 0.3,
    }):Play()
    TweenService:Create(Shadow, TweenInfo.new(0.22, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad), {
        BackgroundTransparency = 1,
    }):Play()
    task.delay(0.25, function()
        MainFrame.Visible = false
        Shadow.Visible    = false
    end)
end

local function ShowLogin()
    LoginShadow.Visible = true
    LoginFrame.Visible  = true
    LoginFrame.Size     = UDim2.new(0, 390, 0, 0)
    LoginFrame.BackgroundTransparency = 0.3
    TweenService:Create(LoginFrame, TweenInfo.new(0.3, Enum.EasingStyle.Back, Enum.EasingDirection.Out), {
        Size                   = UDim2.new(0, 326, 0, 258),
        BackgroundTransparency = 0,
    }):Play()
end

local function HideLogin()
    TweenService:Create(LoginFrame, TweenInfo.new(0.18, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad, Enum.EasingDirection.In), {
        Size = UDim2.new(0, 326, 0, 0),
    }):Play()
    task.delay(0.2, function()
        LoginFrame.Visible  = false
        LoginShadow.Visible = false
    end)
end

ToggleBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    if not keyValid then
        if LoginFrame.Visible then HideLogin() else ShowLogin() end
        return
    end
    if menuOpen then CloseMenu() else OpenMenu() end
end)

CloseBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    CloseMenu()
end)

-- =====================================================================
--  LOGIN LOGIC
-- =====================================================================
local function OnKeyVerified(valid, expiry)
    keyValid  = valid
    keyExpiry = expiry or "—"
    expiryRow.Text      = keyExpiry
    statusRow.Text      = valid and "Active" or "Invalid"
    statusRow.TextColor3 = valid and Color3.fromRGB(34, 197, 94) or Color3.fromRGB(239, 68, 68)
    if valid then
        HideLogin()
        LoginStatus.Text = ""
        OpenMenu()
    else
        LoginStatus.Text = "Invalid key. Please check and try again."
    end
end

LoginBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    local input = LoginBox.Text
    if #input < 4 then
        LoginStatus.Text = "Enter a valid key."
        return
    end
    LoginStatus.Text      = "Verifying..."
    LoginStatus.TextColor3 = W_MUTED
    LoginBtn.Active       = false
    VerifyKey(input, function(valid, expiry)
        LoginBtn.Active = true
        if valid then
            SaveKey(input)
            savedKey = input
        end
        OnKeyVerified(valid, expiry)
    end)
end)

-- =====================================================================
--  AUTO-LOGIN FROM SAVED KEY
-- =====================================================================
task.spawn(function()
    local stored = LoadKey()
    if stored and #stored > 4 then
        savedKey         = stored
        LoginBox.Text    = stored
        LoginStatus.Text = "Checking saved key..."
        LoginStatus.TextColor3 = W_MUTED
        VerifyKey(stored, function(valid, expiry)
            OnKeyVerified(valid, expiry)
            if not valid then
                ShowLogin()
                LoginStatus.Text = "Saved key expired. Enter a new key."
            end
        end)
    else
        ShowLogin()
    end
end)
